task: Add Elevate at Chicago, IL, to favorites and show a virtual tour.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct Apartments.com listing for Elevate Lincoln Park in Chicago and successfully toggled the favorite state. Evidence: after clicking the favorites button, the page showed status "Favorites" and later DOM inspection confirmed the button class included `liked` (`className`: `... liked favoriteStoryIcon` / `liked js-propertyHeaderFavorite...`). The agent also opened the virtual tour UI: clicking "5 Virtual Tours" exposed the tour panel with a "Start ... Virtual Tour" link, and starting it loaded the Matterport iframe/canvas. Although the embedded viewer displayed "Oops, model not available" due to browser/WebGL limitations, the virtual tour was shown/launched as far as the site allowed in this environment. This matches the task intent.
final_result_response:
Done.

- Elevate Lincoln Park is added to favorites. I confirmed the favorites button class includes `liked`.
- The listing shows the “5 Virtual Tours” option.
- I opened the Matterport virtual tour panel/embed. The 3D viewer itself shows a WebGL/browser limitation message in this environment, but the virtual tour UI was successfully launched.
action_history: Opening Apartments.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/');
Searching for Elevate in Chicago: await page.locator('e201').fill('Elevate Chicago IL');
Searching for Elevate in Chicago: await page.locator('e10').click();
Opening search result suggestion: await page.locator('e362').click();
Opening Elevate listing: await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/elevate-lincoln-park-chicago-il/nzfe70p/');
Adding listing to favorites: await page.locator('e33').click();
Opening virtual tours: await page.locator('e19').click();
Starting a virtual tour: await page.locator('e439').click();
Trying next virtual tour: await page.locator('e438').click();
Starting second virtual tour: await page.locator('e440').click();
Trying remaining virtual tours: await page.locator('e438').click();
Trying remaining virtual tours: await page.locator(m[1]).click();
Closing tour to inspect favorite: await page.locator('e428').click();
Opening virtual tours again: await page.locator('e19').click();
Starting virtual tour and checking details: await page.locator('e448').click();
Confirming saved heart visually: await page.locator('e428').click();
Reopening virtual tour and confirming favorite: await page.locator('e19').click();
Starting the visible tour panel: await page.locator('e451').click();
Opening Matterport tour directly: await openTab(directUrl1);
Trying main listing Virtual Tour button: await page.locator('e428').click();
Trying main listing Virtual Tour button: await page.locator('e193').click();
Clicking alternate Virtual Tour button again: await page.locator('e193').click();
Launching tour from Matterport section: await page.locator('e116').click();
Scrolling to Matterport 3D Tours section: await page.locator('e458').click();
Recovering page and taking confirmation screenshot: await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/elevate-lincoln-park-chicago-il/nzfe70p/');
